productDisplayName: Reid & Taylor Men Stripes Blue Socks
description: It's comfort unparalleled once you slip into this pair of striped navy blue socks from Reid and Taylor. Crafted from soft, stretchable fabric, these socks have been designed for the confident executive. Made of a mercerised cotton-lycra blend knit fabric for all-day comfort, easy stretch and sweat-free wear Has grey stripes on the leg region and blue stripes on the footbed region Padded footbed for cushioned comfort Hand finished toe seam for abrasion-free wear Rib knit mouth for a comfortable wear Roomy toe area for superior comfort and durability sock care Machine wash cold in 40 degrees using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not iron, dry clean or tumble dry Dry in shade
